_comment: mobile-cockpit / pwa / config.json — PUBLIC PWA configuration. NOT secret. Loaded by app.js at boot. Values MUST stay in lockstep with flows/mobile-cockpit/lib/config.mjs; the static guard `tests/flows/mobile-cockpit/pwa-config-coherence.sh` enforces this.
_invariant: clientId/tenantId/scopes/stateRelativePath are mirrors of constants defined in lib/config.mjs (AZURE, GRAPH_SCOPES, STATE_RELATIVE_PATH). If you edit one, edit the other in the SAME commit.

ideTabs._comment: M2.1 read-only mirror of live Cursor IDE chat tabs, written by flows/mobile-cockpit/ide-mirror/poll.mjs. PWA fetches GET-only; ETag tracking is not required here. The relativePath MUST match IDE_TABS_RELATIVE_PATH in ide-mirror/poll.mjs (which derives from ONEDRIVE.folderName + 'ide-tabs.json'). pollIntervalSeconds is independent of pwa.pollIntervalSeconds so the lighter read-only path can refresh faster than the sessions list.

session._comment: Mirrors ALLOWED_CWDS + AUTO_APPROVE_DEFAULT from lib/config.mjs (design.md §7 L2 + L3). Coherence enforced by pwa-config-coherence.sh.

pwa.redirectUriProdDoc: Set this to the OneDrive-share-link URL of pwa/index.html once Stage B (deploy) runs. For Stage A1 (local dev), only redirectUriDev matters.
